title: erigeron strigosus
intro: Erigeron strigosus, also known as the daisy fleabane or prairie fleabane, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. Erigeron strigosus is known to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
